errors.message: This capability is unavailable on the Host.
The checkpoint is not available in this runtime.
The checkpoint does not support the requested rewind scope.
The referenced content has expired.
The running daemon does not match the installed CLI.
The selected directory no longer exists.
The requested effort is not supported by the model.
The requested Git object is not available.
Git information is not available for this workspace.
Another client currently holds the Host lease.
Reasonix Remote is not running on the Host.
The requested Session profile is invalid.
The client no longer holds the Host lease.
The requested model is not available on the Host.
The selected path is not a directory.
The requested path is not a regular file.
The active Operation does not match the requested Operation.
There is no active Operation.
The requested workspace path does not exist.
The Host user cannot access the requested resource.
The requested decision is not allowed for this Prompt.
The Prompt type does not match this response.
The Prompt is no longer pending.
The Host query could not be completed.
The recovery-only safety check failed.
Reasonix Remote is not installed on the Host.
The request identifier was reused for a different operation.
Rewind did not complete and state may have changed.
The Session runtime could not be started.
The Session is busy with conflicting work.
Session cleanup is still in progress.
The Session is not available.
The Session state could not be persisted.
The Session is in the trash.
The Session snapshot has expired.
This transport has been replaced by a newer connection.
The query cursor has expired.
The directory selection has expired.
The Host runtime has restarted.
The Session runtime has been replaced.
The subscription is not available on this transport.
Only an empty Topic can be deleted.
The Topic is not available.
The trash entry is not available.
A Turn is already running in this Session.
The active Turn does not match the requested Turn.
There is no active Turn.
Desktop and Host CLI builds do not match.
The workspace still has active Session work.
The workspace is not available on this Host.
The Session does not belong to the requested workspace.
